notes: Fun fact: The Great Pyramid of Giza was the tallest man-made structure on Earth for over 3,800 years. Nothing else even came close until Lincoln Cathedral in 1311.
highlights: Liked: The scale of ancient Egyptian architecture in person is humbling. Photos do not capture it. You feel small, and that is the point.
Did not like: Traffic in Cairo is a full-contact sport. No lanes, no rules, just collective momentum and faith.
